_doc: High-level map of the live discovery seed/planning pipeline.
historical_numbering_note: The numbered files in this folder are documentation buckets, not the exact runtime order.
schema_ssot: src/features/indexing/discovery/pipelineContextSchema.js — cumulative Zod schema with 8 progressive checkpoints validated at each stage boundary by the orchestrator. This is the authoritative runtime contract for pipeline data shapes.

runtime_order.name: Seed setup
does: loadEnabledSourceEntries()
normalizePlanningHints()
force discoveryEnabled=true
default empty searchEngines to bing,google

runtime_order.name: NeedSet
does: computeNeedSet() builds schema_version needset_output.v2
buildSearchPlanningContext() builds schema_version search_planning_context.v2
buildSearchPlan() builds schema_version needset_planner_output.v2
emit needset_computed preview before the Schema 4 LLM call
emit needset_computed again with Schema 4 panel data when available
emit schema4_handoff_ready when search_plan_handoff has queries

runtime_order.name: Brand Resolver
does: cache-first brand-domain lookup
optional routed triage LLM call
optional manufacturer auto-promotion into categoryConfig source maps
emit brand_resolved through the caller logger
conditional: skips to empty result when brand is empty
skips to empty result when no triage route is available
returns empty result on resolver failure

runtime_order.name: Search Profile
does: load learning artifacts and merge learningStoreHints into the lexicon
build deterministic Search Profile returning { searchProfileBase }
runtime_order.note: This stage is in-memory only. The planned search_profile artifact is written by Query Journey.

runtime_order.name: Search Planner
does: receive tier-tagged query_rows from Search Profile
call enhanceQueryRows() for tier-aware LLM query enhancement
tier metadata is passthrough — only query strings change
Tier 3 rows carry progressive enrichment context (aliases, domain hints, content types, retry history)
fallback: rows returned unchanged when no API key, no model, or LLM fails twice
emit search_plan_generated when LLM enhancement succeeds

runtime_order.name: Query Journey
does: receive enhanced rows from Search Planner (LLM-enhanced or deterministic fallback — treated identically)
dedupe, rank by field priority, cap to searchProfileQueryCap
apply identity guard to the ranked set
build llm_queries from rows where hint_source ends with _llm
write the planned search_profile artifact
emit query_journey_completed

runtime_order.name: Search execution
does: emit search_queued before execution so the GUI pre-populates worker slots
internal-first corpus search when enabled
frontier cache reuse
Google Crawlee transport for google
SearXNG transport for non-google engines
plan-only fallback only when no provider path exists and rawResults is still empty

runtime_order.name: SERP triage
does: dedupe results
hard drops
LLM selector path when serpSelectorEnabled and a triage route are both available
deterministic domain classification (runs AFTER SERP selector)
fallback deterministic soft-label, lane, scoring, and quota selection path
optional rerankSerpResults() annotation on the deterministic path
write executed search_profile and discovery payloads

runtime_order.name: Planner queue handoff
does: enqueue approved URLs as discovery_approved
seed candidate URLs only when fetchCandidateSources is enabled and maxCandidateUrls > 0
emit discovery_enqueue_summary from planner counters when available

artifacts.seed_phase_carrythrough: runDiscoverySeedPlan() attaches seed_search_plan_output to the discovery result

llm_surfaces.conditional: only when config.serpSelectorEnabled is true and hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) is true

runtime_bridge.search_profile_event_note: search_profile_generated is emitted from Query Journey after Search Planner, but the bridge maps it to the Search Profile tab

learning_loop.wiring_status: Learning stores are read at bootstrap and consumed by Search Profile (Stage 03) for query template injection and lexicon enrichment. They are NOT passed to NeedSet — runNeedSet() passes learning: null into buildSearchPlanningContext(). NeedSet planning relies on per-run feedback (previousFieldHistories + queryExecutionHistory) instead of cross-product learning.

per_run_feedback.previousFieldHistories: Per-field retry counts, domains_tried, content_types_tried. Built by buildFieldHistories() at finalization, passed via roundContext to next round. Drives Tier 3 progressive enrichment and group exhaustion detection.
per_run_feedback.queryExecutionHistory: Per-query completion state from frontierDb. Built by buildQueryExecutionHistory(productId) before NeedSet. Drives seed completion, group_query_count, tier allocation.

cross_product_learning.scope: Category-level, persisted to SQLite (_learning/{category}/spec.sqlite), survives across runs and products
cross_product_learning.consumed_by: Search Profile (Stage 03) only — learnedQueries.templates_by_field, templates_by_brand, enrichedLexicon, fieldYieldByDomain
cross_product_learning.not_consumed_by: NeedSet planner (learning: null), Search Planner LLM, SERP triage
